note_main_file: id=21 Improved Lay on Hands (spec_tree=-1) is a Holy-tree talent — not duplicated here.
id=22 Healing Light (spec_tree=-1) is a Holy-tree talent — not duplicated here.
Both were fixed in talent_affixes.json using the spellinfo data below.
_notes.note_no_shared_bits: No shared Paladin family marker bits identified across all 14 verified carrier spells. No exclusions required.
_notes.note_seals_partial: Seals of the Pure (id=200) and Sanctified Seals (Ret id=241) use Seal of Righteousness flags only. Seal of Vengeance(31801) and Seal of Corruption flags were not run — if they have different bits, OR them in for full coverage.

talent_affixes._todo: Spiritual Focus (5r, tier 1) — Reduces pushback chance while casting Flash of Light and Holy Light by 14/28/42/56/70%. Pushback resistance mechanic, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Seals of the Pure
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[134217728,536870912,0]: SoR(20154) mask0 bit27(0x8000000=134217728)|mask1 bit29(0x20000000=536870912). NOTE: Seal of Vengeance(31801)/Seal of Corruption not yet run — OR in their unique bits if different from SoR. Seal damage +3%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Divine Intellect (5r, tier 2) — Increases total Intellect by 3%/rank. Passive stat bonus, not implementable as SpellMod.
Unyielding Faith (2r, tier 2) — Reduces Fear and Disorient duration by 10/20%. Mechanic resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.
Aura Mastery (1r, tier 3) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Illumination (5r, tier 3) — After a critical heal, restores mana equal to 20/40/60/80/100% of base mana cost. Proc-based mana return, not implementable as SpellMod.
Improved Concentration Aura (3r, tier 4) — Increases Concentration Aura interrupt resistance and reduces silence/interrupt duration. Aura/mechanic effect, not implementable as SpellMod.

talent_affixes.name: Improved Blessing of Wisdom
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[65536,0,0]=0x10000 (mask0 bit16). No shared Paladin marker bits. BoW mana-per-5 EFFECT1 +10%/rank.

talent_affixes._todo: Pure of Heart (2r, tier 4) — Reduces duration of Curse and Disease effects by 25/50%. Debuff duration resistance, not implementable as SpellMod.
Divine Favor (1r, tier 5) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.

talent_affixes.name: Sanctified Light
talent_affixes.notes: flags=[2149580800,0,0]=0x80200000: HL(635) mask0 bit31(0x80000000=2147483648)|HS(20473) mask0 bit21(0x200000=2097152). No shared Paladin marker bits. Crit chance +2%/rank (CRIT_CHANCE FLAT: 200=2%).

talent_affixes._todo: Purifying Power (2r, tier 5) — Reduces mana cost of Cleanse/Consecration by 5%/rank and Exorcism/Holy Wrath by 10%/rank. Two different percentage values for different spell groups — not cleanly implementable as a single SpellMod entry. Could be split into two entries after spellinfo verification, but skipping for now.

talent_affixes.name: Holy Power
talent_affixes.notes: Holy spell critical damage bonus +3%/rank. All-ones used since Holy school cannot be targeted via Paladin family SpellMod directly; acceptable scope for Holy spec.

talent_affixes._todo: Holy Guidance (5r, tier 6) — Increases spell power by 6/12/18/24/35% of total Intellect. Passive stat conversion (Intellect → SP), not implementable as SpellMod.

Enlightened Judgements (2r, tier 7) — Increases Judgement range by 10/20 yards and hit chance by 2/4%. Range bonus not a standard SpellMod op; hit chance could be RESIST_MISS_CHANCE but requires Judgement spell flags. Skipping.
Beacon of Light (1r, tier 7) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
Judgements of the Pure (5r, tier 8) — Your Judgements increase your casting speed by 3/6/9/12/15% for 1 min. Proc-based haste buff, not implementable as SpellMod.

Infusion of Light (2r, tier 8) — After Holy Shock crit, reduces cast time of next Holy Light by 1.5/3 sec or Flash of Light cost by 50/100%. Proc-based next-cast modifier, not implementable as SpellMod.
Illuminated Healing (3r, tier 9) — Your Holy Light also places an absorb shield on the target equal to 10/20/30% of the amount healed. Proc-based absorb, not implementable as SpellMod.
Divine Illumination (1r, tier 10) — Single-rank talent, excluded by design.
